title: Boson Sampling: Computational Advantage with Photonics
description: Understand boson sampling as a path to quantum computational advantage, including the mathematical foundations, experimental implementations, and extensions like Gaussian boson sampling.
learningObjectives: Explain the computational complexity of boson sampling
Understand the permanent function and its connection to photon counting
Describe experimental requirements for boson sampling advantage
Compare standard and Gaussian boson sampling protocols
Analyze verification and validation of boson sampling experiments
